# Business context

## Problem statement
**Answer:** Users struggle to track household spending across multiple accounts.
**Confidence:** medium
**Evidence:** user input
**Skill:** lamina-problem-framing

## Business goals
**Answer:** Launch a budgeting app that reduces financial anxiety for young families.
**Confidence:** medium
**Evidence:** user input
**Skill:** lamina-stakeholder-alignment

## Success metrics
**Answer:** 40% weekly active usage within 90 days of launch.
**Confidence:** low
**Evidence:** assumption — needs validation
**Skill:** lamina-quantitative-validation

## Scope
**Answer:** Mobile-first budgeting for US households; excludes investment advice.
**Confidence:** high
**Evidence:** user input
**Skill:** lamina-feature-prioritization

## Users & market
**Answer:** Dual-income households with shared expenses; alternatives include spreadsheets and Mint.
**Confidence:** medium
**Evidence:** user input
**Skill:** lamina-competitive-analysis

## Product posture
**Answer:** Mobile app with sovereign role in daily money decisions.
**Confidence:** medium
**Evidence:** user input
**Skill:** lamina-platform-posture

## Constraints
**Answer:** Six-month MVP timeline; must comply with basic financial data privacy expectations.
**Confidence:** high
**Evidence:** user input
**Skill:** lamina-research-scoping

## Stakeholders
**Answer:** Product lead and engineering must align on scope before ideation.
**Confidence:** medium
**Evidence:** user input
**Skill:** lamina-stakeholder-alignment

## Risks & unknowns
**Answer:** Willingness to pay is unvalidated; bank linking complexity may delay launch.
**Confidence:** low
**Evidence:** assumption — needs validation
**Skill:** lamina-feature-discovery

## Research posture
**Answer:** Evaluative — test onboarding and categorization flows before build.
**Confidence:** medium
**Evidence:** user input
**Skill:** lamina-research-scoping

## Triad check
**Answer:** Desirability is weakest — need evidence users want another budgeting tool.
**Confidence:** medium
**Evidence:** user input
**Skill:** lamina-product-behavior
